column1: Hey Said, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
what's good we got your form on our website for some spring break options. were you still interested in info?
sorry for the late response, was busy with a few things
All good fam. which week is your spring break
bet bet. Punta Cana and Cancun are def the top destinations. those the ones you were interested in?
we were thinking of going with punta cana
Word yea I'll be in Punta Cana too. would be dope to have you and your group there
how many ppl in your group?
thats solid, you all from the same school?
Fire which school you all from
Oh dope we've had a couple ppl groups from your school
y'all def know how to party lol. Jersey energy
would it be fine, if its 3 guys and one girl in a room? its my boys gf.
long as she's okay with it yea bro
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
pretty soon, id day within the week or 2 max
word yea things are def moving quick so I'll send what we have rn at the moment and then we can go from there
will add in a discount and a payment plan to make it easy
no payment plan would be needed, we just want to book asap to get it over with.
I feel that. it'll be a two installment plan so a deposit of $200 and then remaining balance due in 2 weeks or before
but you can also pay in full upfront. just give the option
I'll show you what it looks like. is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
word whats the best email to send to
just sent, lmk if it came through
so whenever im ready to book, i just go through with the email?
nah just shoot me a text and I'll set up your reservation
whats the difference between occidental punta cana and riu republica
yea two diff resorts. occ punta cana is def more college students. the riu tends to be a little more expensive
I'll personally be at the Occ Punta Cana
ok perfect. and is there options to include flights with everything so its easier
yea def, its just more expensive doing all through us than getting flights separately on your own. but if you'd rather the convenience we can make it happen for sure
just like to send everyone the most cost efficient way
yea if thats the case then we'll just book it separately. just to double make sure what airport would it be.
alright let me talk and let my group know everything and ill talk to you very soon.
Said whats good bro, hows everyone feelin so far?
im good, everyones looking on board. should be ready by this week, max next week. is that fine?
I think so yea just keep me posted and I'll let you know what availability is lookin like
bet just lmk, will hit you up asap when we're 100% ready
just want to let you know that were ready to book, but its only going to be three of us.
the three of us want to book today
hey. okay cool I'll set it up for you right now
We rollin with the Occidental Punta Cana package? 5 nights, or 4?
yup, how many nights though, 4 nights?
bet, I'll set this up rn
just sent that over via email. the email has a breakdown on how to navigate through
saw you just started a res from the old quote, use the new one in the email if you dont mind
its all set up perfectly and ready to rock
ofc! no prob lmk if anyone needs help
for the party package, can i buy that before the trip?
yea you can purchase that up to 2 days before the trip. its an add on option within your account
is it possible to take someones name off for the group reservation?
something came up and its not letting me take her name off
someone else is going to replace her
okay cool will clear her name

is there any way to push that deadline a little further, some people are having trouble getting money together but they are agreeing on going, its just that deadline is too close. Sorry again for this, my friends are just really bad at managing things. But they are going, just need a little more time for the deadline. Im fully paid for, it's just my friends being a pain.

Hey man, change of plans. I wanted to reach out because my friends aren’t really complying anymore and a couple of them backed out. There was also a problem with the dates and money on their end. At this point, I don’t think the trip is happening anymore. Since they’re not going and don’t have the funds for it, I was wondering if there’s any possibility of getting a refund on the resort booking. Sorry for the headache, and please let me know if there’s anything I can do, I’d really appreciate it.
Also, if there’s any way you could push the deadline back a little for us, then it should be good to go. Just let me know if that’s possible.
the only way the trip will happen is if you’re able to extend the deadlines a bit. If that’s possible on your end, then we should be good to go. Please let me know.
how much time did they need for the payment?
at least a week longer or even 2 weeks more from jan 9
thats the only way they'll be able to come
they just need a little more time for the payments in general.
when would they be able to deposit to secure?
but the deadline for final payment they need a little bit more time than the 9th. only like a week or two longer
what day next week can they deposit by, is the 6th aight?
happy new year to you too!
they can deposit that same week
just curious, if one of my friends is able to come as a fourth person, is there any way u can change the room from a 3 person to a 4 person room if it ends up working out for him.
Does the 6th deposit and 20th final payment work?
And yea we can add a fourth just let me know
for the deposit can you do the end of that week if possible pls
okay, will get that updated. and is it def 4 ppl?
my bad thats not meant for you lol, but whats good bro did the trip fall through?
